title: Implement comprehensive adversarial smoke test harness

comments.author: anon-295fd0bb
comments.content: Implementing the smoke test harness from DESIGN-SMOKE-TEST-HARNESS.md (GH#350). Splitting into 11 parallel agents: 1) Harness foundation, 2) Issue CRUD+boundaries, 3) Issue org, 4) Comments+sessions+timer, 5) Data management, 6) Infrastructure commands, 7) Tooling commands, 8) Server API+WebSocket, 9) Coordination, 10) Adversarial, 11) TUI+proptest.
